en.text: are before me: and there are that raise up
that are not theirs. breadth: Heb. breadths
of themselves. their judgment: or, from them shall proceed the judgment of these, and the captivity of these
. their: or, the supping up of their faces, etc: or, their faces shall look (Heb. the opposition of their faces) toward the east
. mighty: Heb. rock. established: Heb. founded
thou upon them that deal treacherously
the man that is more righteous
all of them with the angle
unto me, and what I shall answer
. tower: Heb. fenced place unto me: or, in me when: or, when I am argued with: Heb. upon my reproof, or, arguing
is yet for an appointed time
for it; because it will surely
Shall not all these take up
that which is not his! how long? and to him that ladeth
thee, and thou shalt be for booties
! coveteth: or, gaineth and evil gain power: Heb. palm of the hand
it. beam: or, piece, or, fastening answer it: or, witness against it
Behold, is it not of the LORD
. with: or, by knowing the glory
unto him that giveth his neighbour
to him, and makest him drunken
thou also, and let thy foreskin be uncovered
. with: or, more with shame than with glory
? maker of: Heb. fashioner of his fashion
him. let: Heb. be silent all the earth before him
. upon: or, according to variable songs, or, tunes, called in Hebrew, Shigionoth
. speech: Heb. report, or, hearing revive: or, preserve alive
. horns: or, bright beams out of his side
. Cushan: or, Ethiopia in: or, under affliction, or, vanity
. earth: or, rivers of the earth
. at the light: or, thine arrows walked in the light
: they came out as a whirlwind
in myself, that I might rest
, he will invade them with his troops
. invade: or, cut them in pieces
, and there shall be no herd
feet, and he will make me to walk
